requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL make durable control signals the source of truth for fiber wake, resume, and interrupt scheduling while keeping signal payloads bounded and separate from message history.

case.given: A wake message such as LLM done, tool done, child done, human input, or heartbeat arrives
case.when: The runtime persists the durable control signal
case.then: The signal SHALL include scheduling metadata sufficient for wake/resume recovery
The signal SHALL NOT duplicate unbounded mailbox payloads that are owned by actor mailbox, transcript, conversation, or artifact persistence

case.given: A signal is pending when the process exits
case.then: The runtime SHALL redeliver the intended mailbox message using the actor mailbox snapshot or payload reference
The fiber SHALL continue without transcript-tail inference

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL model interrupt-capable messages as high-priority control signals that enter actor mailboxes and cooperatively abort current in-flight work.

case.given: A fiber is running or suspended with an in-flight LLM operation
case.then: The signal SHALL be persisted and enqueued in the actor control mailbox with interrupt priority
The runtime SHALL abort the active LLM operation when an abort controller is available
The fiber SHALL observe cancellation at a safe boundary and terminate or suspend according to the cancel policy

case.given: A fiber is waiting on a tool operation
case.then: The runtime SHALL mark the in-flight operation as cancelled
The runtime SHALL abort the tool when it supports AbortSignal
Any late tool completion SHALL be ignored or recorded as a cancelled observation using op id and epoch checks

case.given: An actor is currently inside a handler execution
case.then: The runtime SHALL NOT re-enter the actor handler concurrently
The runtime SHALL set an interrupt state that the current execution observes cooperatively

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL use typed wait reasons for cooperative async boundaries and reserve generic external waiting for true idle or external-human waits.

case.given: A cooperative step suspends for LLM, tool, compression, questionnaire parsing, child completion, or human input
case.then: The fiber SHALL contain a typed waitingReason describing the awaited event class
The cooperative exec state SHALL contain the matching op id or durable wait condition when applicable

case.given: A fiber is suspended on an internal async operation
case.then: The runtime SHALL NOT use generic external as the only wait reason

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL treat pending wake-capable actor mailbox entries as scheduler wake truth even when the matching durable control signal has already been consumed.

case.given: An actor has pending `asyncCompletion` and pending `humanInput` entries
case.when: The runtime schedules the owning fiber
case.then: The fiber SHALL first continue the cooperative async boundary represented by `asyncCompletion` according to actor mailbox priority
The user input SHALL remain queued until the higher-priority async completion has been processed

case.given: An actor has pending `asyncCompletion`, `toolResult`, `childDone`, `memberCoordination`, `humanInput`, `memberChatInbox`, or `control` work
case.when: A goal continuation or other idle hook wants to enqueue `heartbeat` work
case.then: The runtime SHALL NOT treat the actor as idle
The lower-priority `heartbeat` continuation SHALL NOT preempt existing wake work

case.given: A fiber is `ready` and its actor has pending wake-capable mailbox work
case.when: The foreground or background scheduler settles the runtime
case.then: The scheduler SHALL execute an `agent_step` for that fiber or keep settling until the wake work is consumed

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL normalize or actively schedule fibers whose cooperative exec state is waiting on async work while the fiber record is not suspended on the matching typed wait reason.

case.given: A fiber record is `ready` with `waitingReason` unset
case.then: Its cooperative exec state is `wait_llm` with inflight op id `X`
The actor mailbox contains `asyncCompletion` for op id `X`
case.when: The runtime saves, recovers, or settles the scheduler
case.then: The runtime SHALL either normalize the fiber to `suspended + wait_llm_result` before waiting
Or SHALL schedule an `agent_step` that drains the matching async completion

case.given: A fiber record is `ready` with cooperative exec state `wait_tool` and matching pending completion work
case.when: The runtime saves, recovers, or settles the scheduler
case.then: The runtime SHALL NOT leave the fiber indefinitely idle
The matching tool completion SHALL be consumed or the fiber SHALL be normalized to the typed wait state

case.given: A cooperative exec state has `wait_llm`, `wait_tool`, or `wait_questionnaire_parse` with inflight work
case.when: The scheduler checks whether async work is still outstanding
case.then: The check SHALL include both suspended typed waits and ready fibers with cooperative wait state

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL treat protocol-critical cooperative continuations as mandatory work that must be consumed before a foreground or all-lane settle operation reports a snapshot-safe boundary.

case.given: A foreground fiber is `ready` with cooperative exec state `start_tool`
case.then: The actor history has an assistant tool call awaiting runtime tool startup
case.when: The foreground scheduler settles the runtime for snapshot or turn completion
case.then: The scheduler SHALL continue executing `agent_step` work until `start_tool` creates durable tool operation state or reaches a typed wait
The scheduler SHALL NOT report a snapshot-safe settled state while the `start_tool` continuation remains unconsumed
A ready fiber still has mandatory continuation work
case.when: The runtime evaluates whether the foreground lane is settled
case.then: The runtime SHALL classify the lane as not settled for snapshot purposes
The runtime SHALL either schedule the continuation or surface a diagnostic if progress is impossible

case.given: A fiber actor has returned `yield` and posted `fiber_result` to the orchestrator mailbox
case.when: The scheduler checks for a snapshot-safe boundary
case.then: The runtime SHALL ensure queued orchestrator results that affect scheduling have been delivered or are represented as recoverable durable work

requirement.statement: 系统 SHALL let runtime coordination consumers use AI runtime control barrier APIs instead of duplicating mailbox and cooperative-state classification.

case.given: The runtime coordinator is about to save a snapshot after queued work
case.when: It decides whether foreground progress is needed first
case.then: The coordinator SHALL inspect the AI runtime control barrier
The coordinator SHALL NOT import safepoint implementation from persistence code
